sentence: Never let your brud nonchalashout all over the clarpet.

wombos.definition: A bro who is also a chud — a friend with deeply embarrassing online opinions. Used affectionately, or as a warning before introductions.
wombos.example: Love him, but he's brud-coded — don't read his replies.

wombos.definition: The carpet in a classroom — the scholastic equivalent of a brarpet. Used when someone has a nonchalashout in an academic setting. 'The whole class is gonna nonchalashout all over the clarpet.'
